title: RAISE: Step-by-Step Retrieval-Augmented Inference for Scientific rEasoning

defines.name: RAISE
defines.definition: A step-by-step retrieval-augmented framework for scientific reasoning that decomposes problems, generates logic-enriched queries, and retrieves logically relevant documents from an open-domain corpus.

problem: Existing retrieval-augmented methods for scientific reasoning often retrieve superficially similar documents or assume curated corpora, failing to provide logically relevant evidence for each reasoning step.
